questions.question: In how many ways can 5 books be arranged on a shelf?
How many 3-digit numbers can be formed using digits 1-6 without repetition?
From a group of 7 men and 6 women, a committee of 5 is to be formed. In how many ways can this be done so that the committee has at least 3 men?
How many ways can 4 people sit in a row of 6 chairs?
How many 4-digit even numbers can be formed from 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 with no repetition?
questions.explanation: Last digit: 2 or 4 (2 choices). Remaining 3 digits from 4: 4P3=24. Total=2×24=48.

questions.question: In how many ways can a team of 11 be chosen from 15 players?
How many words can be formed from the letters of BANANA?
questions.explanation: BANANA: 6 letters, A repeated 3 times, N repeated 2 times. 6!/(3!×2!)=720/12=60.
